hero.title: I build real software products.
hero.subtitle: End-to-end software: interfaces, backend systems and production delivery.
hero.proofTitle: Built with production constraints in mind
proofItems: Desktop architecture with clear boundaries: renderer, preload and main process.
Security controls implemented in real product flows, not just listed in slides.
Distribution pipeline with releases, checksums and signed artifacts.
hero.proofFoot: Software meant to be used, audited and shipped with confidence.

flagship.title: KeyPing: a desktop security product built with real-world standards.
flagship.lead: Offline-first credential hygiene app with local encrypted vault, strict process boundaries and a release workflow ready for production.

points.title: Offline by design
points.desc: No mandatory account, no cloud dependency, encrypted local vault.

points.title: Security in depth
points.desc: Master lock, autolock, guarded clipboard, brute-force cooldown and integrity checks.

points.title: Shippable product
points.desc: Auto-update flow, packaging, import/export robustness, checksums and release signing.

capabilities.title: Range to cover the full product, depth where risk is highest.

items.title: Product interfaces
items.desc: Decision-heavy UI for operational contexts, not decorative screens.

items.title: Desktop applications
items.desc: Permission-aware desktop systems with clear runtime boundaries.

items.title: Backend systems and integrations
items.desc: Reliable business logic, contracts and third-party integration resilience.

items.title: Security, architecture and delivery
items.desc: Risk-aware design, maintainable structure and disciplined release execution.

mindset.kicker: How I think / how I build
mindset.title: I optimize for software that still works when real usage starts.
items: Think in constraints before choosing tools.
Validate with real usage, not ideal scenarios.
Ship with discipline, observability and iteration loops.

footprint.title: Tools are means, product outcomes are the goal.

final.title: If you need software that must work in production, let's talk.
final.desc: I build end-to-end products with product judgment, technical rigor and delivery discipline.

page.title: Unax Zulaika | System Core
page.description: System Core interface for Unax Zulaika Fuente portfolio and KeyPing flagship.

startup.title: Manual startup required
startup.copy: Initialize the core runtime and load module graph.

copy.title: Interactive architecture view built around a real product core.
copy.body: This interface is not a static portfolio shell. It is a live system map where KeyPing acts as the primary operational node.

dock.label: Module
dock.defaultCopy: Hover or tap any module to inspect system context.

keyping.title: KeyPing
keyping.copy: Primary module. Open dedicated product view.

about.title: About
about.copy: Engineer focused on practical software architecture, security boundaries and maintainable delivery.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.copy: Electron desktop architecture, Angular frontend systems, secure local storage flows and build automation.

projects.title: Projects
projects.copy: Selected real builds with product intent, operational constraints and technical ownership.

contact.title: Contact
contact.copy: Direct technical conversations and collaboration opportunities.

future.title: Future Builds
future.copy: Locked modules reserved for upcoming systems currently in development.

header.title: KeyPing
header.tagline: Desktop credential hygiene system engineered for local trust.

boundary.title: Process Boundary Map
boundary.copy: Renderer, preload and main process lanes are isolated and validated through typed IPC contracts.

vault.title: Credential Vault Engine
vault.copy: Local vault records are encrypted using AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2 with deterministic lock and timeout policies.

runtime.title: Runtime Safeguards
runtime.copy: Clipboard exposure windows, brute-force protection and offline-only execution constraints are enforced by policy.

release.title: Release Integrity Pipeline
release.copy: Artifacts are distributed with checksums and signature verification to preserve trust from build to install.
